All Implemented Interfaces:
Expression, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, SyntaxElement
public class BinaryXOr extends BinaryOperator
Binary X or.

  • Constructor Details

    • BinaryXOr

      public BinaryXOr(ExtList children)
      Binary X or.
      Parameters:
      children - an ExtList with all children of this node the first children in list will be the one on the left side, the second the one on the right side.
